text.title: Sunset Customer Comms Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Is v2 decision (or shutdown) firm AND ≥30-day window available?

branch.question: Is migration_path locked AND named owner identified?

branch.conclusion: Produce sunset-comms artefact; announce on ≥3 channels.
Skip announce; lock migration path + name owner first.
Skip this methodology. Lock v2 decision + ≥30-day window before any sunset comms.

text.example: decision=v2 window=45d migration=v2+refund-residual owner=ruslan@faion.net → produce artefact per r4.
